title: Opinion: Opinion | Deal Or 'Setup'? Why Both US And Iran Think This Ceasefire Is A Trap
summary_full: Both Washington and Tehran have, rather predictively, sought to frame the outcome as a victory, even as early reports of minor violations hint at the fragility of the arrangement.
